name: aurora-progress-ring
title: Aurora ProgressRing
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
docs:
Aurora ProgressRing is an Aurora UI component for Claude Design parity surfaces.

Install `aurora-tokens` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/progress-ring.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`.
